name: Morrison Floor Lamp Side Table - FLL4020 - Gold/Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Morrison 61 inch gold and black iron floor lamp. This striking piece combines elegance and functionality, featuring a sleek gold stem paired with a black base, adding a touch of sophistication to any room. Crafted from durable metal, the Morrison lamp stands tall at 61 inches, providing ample lighting for reading or ambiance. Its minimalist design complements both contemporary and classic interiors, making it a versatile addition to your decor. Transform your living space with this stylish and modern lighting solution, bringing a warm glow and a refined aesthetic to your home. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, or cozy reading nooks, the Morrison floor lamp enhances your environment with its chic presence. Embrace the blend of form and function with this beautiful lighting accessory.
